result.stdout:
================================================================================
The P commandline tool supports two commands (or modes): compile or check.

usage:> p command options
	 command : compile | check           'compile' to run the P compiler and 
	                                     'check' to run the P checker on the compiled code
	 options:                             use `--help` or `-h` to learn more about the
	                                      corresponding command options
	 -----------------------------------------------------------------------
	 p compile --help                     for P compiler help
	 p check --help                       for P checker help
================================================================================
~~ [PTool]: Thanks for using P! ~~
